originalTitle: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: As part of Microsoft's big Xbox "reset," which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on "higher priority projects," Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. The studio, behind games like Grounded and The Outer Worlds, is starting work on a new Fallout title and has canceled "multiple projects," including a […]
content: As part of Microsoft’s big Xbox “reset,” which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on “higher priority projects,” Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. The studio, behind games like Grounded and The Outer Worlds, is starting work on a new Fallout title and has canceled “multiple projects,” including a sequel to last year’s Avowed, according to Bloomberg. Despite the success of the Fallout TV show, which is getting a third season, Xbox hasn’t released a new game in the series since 2018’s Fallout 76. Josh Sawyer, Obsidian’s studio design director, will head up the new Fallout game. Sawyer, who has also served as director on 2022’s Pentiment and on Fallout: New Vegas, had apparently been directing an RPG that was “similar structurally and thematically to Fallout but was not part of the franchise,” Bloomberg says. As for the Avowed sequel, Bloomberg reports that development was “going well” and would have been announced within the next year. Obsidian still plans to work on the early access game Grounded 2 and on DLC for The Outer Worlds 2. Xbox spokesperson Delaney Simmons declined to comment. The company laid off about 25 percent of Obsidian’s staff this week, according to Kotaku.
chineseTitle: 微软的 Xbox 重置将由黑曜石转向《辐射》而不是《宣告》
chineseSummary: 作为微软 Xbox 大型“重置”的一部分，包括裁员 3,200 名员工、放弃工作室以及将投资重点转向“更优先的项目”，黑曜石娱乐正在改变其计划。该工作室开发了《Grounded》和《天外世界》等游戏，正在开始开发一款新的《辐射》游戏，并取消了“多个项目”，其中包括 […]
chineseContent: 作为微软 Xbox 大型“重置”的一部分，包括裁员 3,200 名员工、放弃工作室以及将投资重点转向“更优先的项目”，黑曜石娱乐正在改变其计划。据彭博社报道，该工作室开发了《Grounded》和《天外世界》等游戏，正在开始开发一款新的《辐射》游戏，并取消了“多个项目”，其中包括去年《Avowed》的续集。尽管《辐射》电视节目取得了第三季的成功，但自 2018 年的《辐射 76》以来，Xbox 还没有发布该系列的新游戏。黑曜石工作室设计总监 Josh Sawyer 将负责新的《辐射》游戏。索耶还曾担任 2022 年《Pentiment》和《辐射：新维加斯》的导演，彭博社表示，他显然一直在执导一款“在结构和主题上与辐射相似，但不属于该系列的一部分”的角色扮演游戏。至于《Avowed》续集，彭博社报道称，开发“进展顺利”，并将在明年内宣布。 Obsidian 仍计划开发抢先体验游戏《Grounded 2》和《天外世界 2》的 DLC。Xbox 发言人 Delaney Simmons 拒绝置评。据 Kotaku 报道，该公司本周解雇了大约 25% 的 Obsidian 员工。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
